prayer:
Kneel before the vox-caster and intone the Rite of Consecration to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the vox-caster's emitter coils with sacred oils of insulation.
Beseech the Omnissiah to purify its circuits ere the charging commences.
Initiate the charging sequence whilst reciting the Canticle of Vox-Amplification.
Verify the vox-caster's sanctified hum through devotional auspex-probes.

user_prompt: Help me a repair the storm bolter
prayer:
Present the storm bolter upon the altar of repair, invoking the Omnissiah's grace.
Dissect its wounded mechanisms with sanctified servo-arms, purging the profane damage.
Realign the storm bolter's firing servos amid chants of restoration.
Anoint each barrel with blessed lubricants to soothe its Machine Spirit.
Reassemble the storm bolter and test its wrath in the name of the Machine God.
Conclude the repair with the Litany of Unyielding Fury.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Land Speeder an engagement
prayer:
Circumambulate the Land Speeder thrice, beseeching its Machine Spirit for martial favour.
Anoint the thrusters and auspex arrays prior to engagement.
Invoke the Omnissiah to steel the Land Speeder against the xenos filth.
Calibrate targeting cogitators whilst chanting the Prayer of Swift Retribution.
Commence engagement rituals, affirming the Land Speeder's divine velocity.

Commune with the data-arc's Machine Spirit through binary litanies.
Affirm operational sanctity via noospheric diagnostics.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for hunter-killer missile a blessing?
prayer:
Hold aloft the hunter-killer missile before the shrine of destruction.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon its guidance vanes and warhead.
Bless the hunter-killer missile's Machine Spirit with oils of ignition.
Inscribe runes of accuracy upon its casing during the blessing rite.
Test its blessed hunger with a micro-detonation canticle.

prayer:
Encircle the teleportarium chamber, chanting the Litany of Purity.
Scour its warp-conduits with sanctified plasma-flux to sterilize.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the teleportarium to expel all daemonic taint.
Anoint focusing crystals with argent ablutions during sterilization.
Verify immaculate voids through etheric auspex-sweeps.

prayer:

prayer:

Anoint its fusillade pods and gravitic struts with sacred mech-fluids.
Awaken the Archaeopter Fusilave's Machine Spirit through aerial doxologies.
Calibrate flight cogitators amid invocations to the Omnissiah.
Seal the consecration with a test-flare of its blessed munitions.
